title: Ecological Systems
description: Students don't exist in isolation. They move through nested systems — classrooms, institutions, families, cultures — and the interactions between those layers matter more than any single one.

title: Theoretical Framework
description: Click and drag to explore how the theories connect. Each node is a lens for understanding why students persist or depart — and why measuring resilience after failure requires all of them.

title: One Conversation
description: A single structured contact was associated with roughly doubling the rate at which students returned to good standing. Not a semester of intervention. One conversation.
